lines.english: Lesson 34
lines.chinese: 第34课
lines.raw: Lesson 34 | 第34课

lines.english: Adolescence
lines.chinese: 青春期
lines.raw: Adolescence | 青春期

lines.english: What do adolescents respect in parents?
lines.chinese: 青少年尊重父母什么？
lines.raw: What do adolescents respect in parents? | 青少年尊重父母什么？

lines.english: Parents are often upset when their children praise the homes of their friends and regard it as a slur on their own cooking, or cleaning, or furniture,
lines.chinese: 当孩子们赞美朋友家，并将其视为对自己烹饪、清洁或家具的诋毁时，父母常常感到不安，
lines.raw: Parents are often upset when their children praise the homes of their friends and regard it as a slur on their own cooking, or cleaning, or furniture, | 当孩子们赞美朋友家，并将其视为对自己烹饪、清洁或家具的诋毁时，父母常常感到不安，

lines.english: and often are foolish enough to let the adolescents see that they are annoyed.
lines.chinese: 并且常常愚蠢到让青少年看出他们很恼火。
lines.raw: and often are foolish enough to let the adolescents see that they are annoyed. | 并且常常愚蠢到让青少年看出他们很恼火。

lines.english: They may even accuse them of disloyalty, or make some spiteful remark about the friends' parents.
lines.chinese: 他们甚至可能指责孩子们不忠，或者对朋友的父母说些恶毒的话。
lines.raw: They may even accuse them of disloyalty, or make some spiteful remark about the friends' parents. | 他们甚至可能指责孩子们不忠，或者对朋友的父母说些恶毒的话。

lines.english: Such a loss of dignity and descent into childish behaviour on the part of the adults deeply shocks the adolescents,
lines.chinese: 这种成年人丧失尊严、行为幼稚的举动深深地震惊了青少年，
lines.raw: Such a loss of dignity and descent into childish behaviour on the part of the adults deeply shocks the adolescents, | 这种成年人丧失尊严、行为幼稚的举动深深地震惊了青少年，

lines.english: and makes them resolve that in future they will not talk to their parents about the places or people they visit.
lines.chinese: 并使他们决心将来不再和父母谈论他们去过的地方或见过的人。
lines.raw: and makes them resolve that in future they will not talk to their parents about the places or people they visit. | 并使他们决心将来不再和父母谈论他们去过的地方或见过的人。

lines.english: Before very long the parents will be complaining that the child is so secretive and never tells them anything,
lines.chinese: 不久之后，父母就会抱怨孩子如此守口如瓶，从不告诉他们任何事情，
lines.raw: Before very long the parents will be complaining that the child is so secretive and never tells them anything, | 不久之后，父母就会抱怨孩子如此守口如瓶，从不告诉他们任何事情，

lines.english: but they seldom realize that they have brought this on themselves.
lines.chinese: 但他们很少意识到这是他们自找的。
lines.raw: but they seldom realize that they have brought this on themselves. | 但他们很少意识到这是他们自找的。

lines.english: Disillusionment with the parents,
lines.chinese: 对父母的幻灭，
lines.raw: Disillusionment with the parents, | 对父母的幻灭，

lines.english: however good and adequate they may be both as parents and as individuals, is to some degree inevitable.
lines.chinese: 无论他们作为父母和个人有多么优秀和称职，在某种程度上都是不可避免的。
lines.raw: however good and adequate they may be both as parents and as individuals, is to some degree inevitable. | 无论他们作为父母和个人有多么优秀和称职，在某种程度上都是不可避免的。

lines.english: Most children have such a high ideal of their parents,
lines.chinese: 大多数孩子对父母抱有如此高的期望，
lines.raw: Most children have such a high ideal of their parents, | 大多数孩子对父母抱有如此高的期望，

lines.english: unless the parents themselves have been unsatisfactory, that it can hardly hope to stand up to a realistic evaluation.
lines.chinese: 除非父母本身表现不尽人意，否则这种期望几乎不可能经受住现实的评估。
lines.raw: unless the parents themselves have been unsatisfactory, that it can hardly hope to stand up to a realistic evaluation. | 除非父母本身表现不尽人意，否则这种期望几乎不可能经受住现实的评估。

lines.english: Parents would be greatly surprised and deeply touched if they realized how much belief their children usually have in their character and infallibility,
lines.chinese: 如果父母意识到孩子们通常对他们的品格和不犯错抱有多大的信念，他们会大吃一惊并深受感动，
lines.raw: Parents would be greatly surprised and deeply touched if they realized how much belief their children usually have in their character and infallibility, | 如果父母意识到孩子们通常对他们的品格和不犯错抱有多大的信念，他们会大吃一惊并深受感动，

lines.english: and how much this faith means to a child.
lines.chinese: 以及这种信念对一个孩子意味着什么。
lines.raw: and how much this faith means to a child. | 以及这种信念对一个孩子意味着什么。

lines.english: If parents were prepared for this adolescent reaction,
lines.chinese: 如果父母对这种青春期反应有所准备，
lines.raw: If parents were prepared for this adolescent reaction, | 如果父母对这种青春期反应有所准备，

lines.english: and realized that was a sign that the child was growing up
lines.chinese: 并且意识到这是孩子正在成长
lines.raw: and realized that was a sign that the child was growing up | 并且意识到这是孩子正在成长

lines.english: and developing valuable powers of observation and independent judgment,
lines.chinese: 并发展出宝贵的观察力和独立判断力的迹象，
lines.raw: and developing valuable powers of observation and independent judgment, | 并发展出宝贵的观察力和独立判断力的迹象，

lines.english: they would not be so hurt, and therefore would not drive the child into opposition by resenting and resisting it.
lines.chinese: 他们就不会那么受伤，因此也不会因为怨恨和抵制而把孩子推向对立面。
lines.raw: they would not be so hurt, and therefore would not drive the child into opposition by resenting and resisting it. | 他们就不会那么受伤，因此也不会因为怨恨和抵制而把孩子推向对立面。

lines.english: The adolescent, with his passion for sincerity,
lines.chinese: 青少年，怀着对真诚的热情，
lines.raw: The adolescent, with his passion for sincerity, | 青少年，怀着对真诚的热情，

lines.english: always respects a parent who admits that he is wrong, or ignorant,
lines.chinese: 总是尊重承认自己错了、无知，
lines.raw: always respects a parent who admits that he is wrong, or ignorant, | 总是尊重承认自己错了、无知，

lines.english: or even that he has been unfair or unjust.
lines.chinese: 甚至不公平或不公正的父母。
lines.raw: or even that he has been unfair or unjust. | 甚至不公平或不公正的父母。

lines.english: What the child cannot forgive is the parents' refusal to admit these charges if the child knows them to be true.
lines.chinese: 孩子不能原谅的是，如果孩子知道这些指控是真的，父母却拒绝承认。
lines.raw: What the child cannot forgive is the parents' refusal to admit these charges if the child knows them to be true. | 孩子不能原谅的是，如果孩子知道这些指控是真的，父母却拒绝承认。

lines.english: Victorian parents believed that they kept their dignity by retreating behind an unreasoning authoritarian attitude in fact they did nothing of the kind,
lines.chinese: 维多利亚时代的父母认为，通过退缩到一种不讲道理的专制态度背后，他们能保持自己的尊严，事实上他们根本没有这样做，
lines.raw: Victorian parents believed that they kept their dignity by retreating behind an unreasoning authoritarian attitude in fact they did nothing of the kind, | 维多利亚时代的父母认为，通过退缩到一种不讲道理的专制态度背后，他们能保持自己的尊严，事实上他们根本没有这样做，

lines.english: but children were then too cowed to let them know how they really felt.
lines.chinese: 但那时的孩子过于害怕，不敢让他们知道自己真实感受。
lines.raw: but children were then too cowed to let them know how they really felt. | 但那时的孩子过于害怕，不敢让他们知道自己真实感受。

lines.english: Today we tend to go to the other extreme,
lines.chinese: 今天我们倾向于走向另一个极端，
lines.raw: Today we tend to go to the other extreme, | 今天我们倾向于走向另一个极端，

lines.english: but on the whole this is a healthier attitude both for the child and the parent.
lines.chinese: 但总的来说，这对孩子和父母都是一种更健康的态度。
lines.raw: but on the whole this is a healthier attitude both for the child and the parent. | 但总的来说，这对孩子和父母都是一种更健康的态度。

lines.english: It is always wiser and safer to face up to reality, however painful it may be at the moment.
lines.chinese: 面对现实总是更明智和更安全的，无论当下它可能多么痛苦。
lines.raw: It is always wiser and safer to face up to reality, however painful it may be at the moment. | 面对现实总是更明智和更安全的，无论当下它可能多么痛苦。
